inputs.label: Receiving End Voltage
inputs.businessContext: Nominal voltage at the load end of the transmission line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Nominal voltage at the load end of the transmission line.
businessContext_i18n.tr: İletim hattının yük ucundaki nominal gerilim.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Tension nominale à l'extrémité de charge de la ligne de transmission.

inputs.label: Line Resistance
inputs.businessContext: Total resistance of the transmission line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total resistance of the transmission line.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Résistance totale de la ligne de transmission.

inputs.label: Line Reactance
inputs.businessContext: Total inductive reactance of the transmission line.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total inductive reactance of the transmission line.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Réactance inductive totale de la ligne de transmission.

inputs.label: Power Factor
inputs.businessContext: Lagging power factor of the load (cos φ). Assumes inductive load.

businessContext_i18n.en: Lagging power factor of the load (cos φ). Assumes inductive load.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yükün geri güç faktörü (cos φ). Endüktif yük varsayılır.
businessContext_i18n.de: Nachlaufender Leistungsfaktor der Last (cos φ). Geht von induktiver Last aus.
businessContext_i18n.fr: Facteur de puissance retard de la charge (cos φ). Suppose une charge inductive.
